Each wheel has A–Z. Spin them to spell your name.

You're all set

Ẉ̵̀h̶̟͛͑ȏ̴̙͌ ̴̮͑̾̍d̵̬̮̞̄̐͌o̶̹̟̘͐e̵̞̙̅̈́͝s̶͍̖͊̾n̷͙͛'̷̫͈̪̈̈́͆ţ̷̮̣̉ ̵̣͐̚̕n̴̪̎ẻ̷̓̚ͅè̶̟͙͂̑d̸̞̞̪͋ ̶̦̪͙̏̓h̴̫̻̪̋̂e̴͕̬̭͗̍l̷̨̫͑͐ͅp̵̯̟̾͑?̴̰͋͋
